title: Thanou's Discs
description: The texture pack replace all the music disc with meme music.
body:
[Introduction to Thanou's Discs](https://youtu.be/MeuhkhnpYjs)
This resource pack replaces all music discs with meme music.                                             
⚠️ This resource pack requires Jukebox Custom Disc Fix to work.                                             
 This resource pack adds:                                             
- 13: Goofy Sounds (1h)                                             
- Cat: Hip Shop (Deltarune)                                             
- Blocks: Chinese meme music                                             
- Chirp: Whopper Song (Extended)                                             
- Far: Case'oh AI Cover                                             
- Mall: Jschlatt sings Aria Math                                             
- Mellohi: American Anthem (with gun and eagle sounds)                                             
- Stal: Nelson sings Midnight City                                             
- Strad: The Muffin Song                                             
- 5: Wenomechainsama                                             
- 11: Don Pollo Song                                             
- Creator (Music Box): PVZ Loonboon Music                                             
- Wait: OMFG – Hi                                             
- Creator: Dance Till You’re Dead (1h)                                             
- Precipice: Pluh x Kerosene                                             
- Otherside: Creeper, Aw Man                                             
- Relic: Never Gonna Give You Up                                             
- Ward: Wonder Villager Cover                                             
- Lava Chicken: Wide Putin Music                                             
- Pigstep: WII Shop Music                                             
- Tears: Walking Polar Bear Sound
